graphql-webclient/src/main/java/com/exam.general_idea: Migrate WebSocket creation from the deprecated HttpClient API to the dedicated WebSocketClient API introduced in newer Vert.x versions.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/D.general_idea: Replace high-level repository abstractions with direct Vert.x SQL client usage to simplify the data initialization logic.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/D.human_impl: Removed imports for PostRepository, CommentRepository, AuthorRepository and replaced them with io.vertx.sqlclient.Pool and Tuple.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/D.general_idea: Remove Lombok dependency for constructor injection and logging, replacing it with manual constructor and static factory method.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/D.human_impl: Replaced @RequiredArgsConstructor and @Slf4j with explicit constructor taking Pool and a static create method.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/D.general_idea: Switch from SLF4J/Lombok logging to standard java.util.logging to align with the new implementation style.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/D.human_impl: Replaced log.info calls with LOGGER.info and LOGGER.warning using java.util.logging.Logger.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/D.general_idea: Simplify the data seeding process by removing complex nested asynchronous chains and random data generation.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/D.human_impl: Replaced IntStream-based random post/comment generation with static Tuple inserts for two specific posts.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/D.general_idea: Wrap database operations in a transaction to ensure data consistency during initialization.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/D.human_impl: Used client.withTransaction to execute DELETE and INSERT statements atomically.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/D.general_idea: Introduce a CountDownLatch to block the initialization thread until the asynchronous database operations complete.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/D.human_impl: Added CountDownLatch and latch.await(500, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS) to wait for completion.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/M.general_idea: Replace Vert.x-specific PropertyDataFetcher with the standard GraphQL Java implementation to reduce framework coupling.
Generalize the database pool return type from PgPool to the generic Pool interface for better abstraction.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/M.human_impl: private Pool pgPool() { ... return Pool.pool(vertx, connectOptions, poolOptions); }

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/M.general_idea: Update DataLoaderRegistry registration to use the beforeExecute callback pattern required by newer GraphQL Java versions.
Simplify DataInitializer constructor by passing the generic Pool instead of individual repository instances.
Fix indentation of commented-out WebSocket handler code for consistency.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Update the exception handler method signature to return a CompletableFuture as required by the newer GraphQL Java API.
Rename the handler method from onException to handleException to match the updated interface contract.
Wrap the synchronous result in a completed CompletableFuture to satisfy the new async return type.
Update the call to the default handler to use the new method name handleException.
Add the missing import for CompletableFuture required by the new return type.
Remove imports for classes that are no longer used in the file after refactoring.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.human_impl: Removed imports for BehaviorSubject, Vertx, and VertxDataFetcher.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Replace Vertx-specific DataFetcher wrapper with standard GraphQL DataFetcher returning CompletionStage.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.human_impl: Changed return type from VertxDataFetcher<List<Post>> to DataFetcher<CompletionStage<List<Post>>> and updated implementation.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Replace Vertx-specific DataFetcher wrapper with standard GraphQL DataFetcher returning CompletionStage.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.human_impl: Changed return type from VertxDataFetcher<Post> to DataFetcher<CompletionStage<Post>> and updated implementation.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Replace Vertx-specific DataFetcher wrapper with standard GraphQL DataFetcher returning CompletionStage.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.human_impl: Changed return type from VertxDataFetcher<UUID> to DataFetcher<CompletionStage<UUID>> and updated implementation.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Replace Vertx-specific DataFetcher wrapper with standard GraphQL DataFetcher returning CompletionStage.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.human_impl: Changed return type from VertxDataFetcher<UUID> to DataFetcher<CompletionStage<UUID>> and updated implementation.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Replace Vert.x-specific DataLoader wrappers with standard Dataloader library interfaces to decouple from Vert.x specific implementations.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.human_impl: Replaced VertxBatchLoader and VertxMappedBatchLoader with BatchLoaderWithContext and MappedBatchLoaderWithContext.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Adopt CompletionStage as the return type for batch loaders to align with modern asynchronous Java standards.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.human_impl: Added .toCompletionStage() to the return values of the load methods.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Switch to DataLoaderFactory for creating DataLoader instances to support the new loader interfaces.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.human_impl: Replaced DataLoader.newDataLoader and DataLoader.newMappedDataLoader with DataLoaderFactory.newDataLoader and DataLoaderFactory.newMappedDataLoader.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Consolidate Dataloader imports into a wildcard import for cleaner code.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.human_impl: Replaced individual org.dataloader imports with org.dataloader.*.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/r.general_idea: Replace explicit imports of io.vertx.sqlclient classes with a wildcard import to reduce boilerplate.
Change the client field type from PgPool to the more generic Pool interface to align with Vert.x 4.5+ API design.
Replace explicit imports with a wildcard import for the io.vertx.sqlclient package to reduce boilerplate.
Change the client field type from PgPool to the more generic Pool interface, likely to align with newer Vert.x API patterns or enable broader compatibility.
Replace explicit imports of io.vertx.sqlclient classes with a wildcard import to reduce boilerplate.
Change the client field type from PgPool to the more generic Pool interface.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/s.general_idea: Add a null check before calling toString() on authorId to prevent NullPointerExceptions.

graphql/src/test/java/com/example/demo/T.general_idea: Remove unused fields from the GraphQL query string in the test to match the simplified data model or response expectations.
graphql/src/test/java/com/example/demo/T.human_impl: Removed `author{ name }` and `comments{ content }` from the query string.

graphql/src/test/java/com/example/demo/T.general_idea: Refactor nested lambda expressions to use concise syntax for better readability.
graphql/src/test/java/com/example/demo/T.human_impl: Changed `testContext.succeeding(buffer -> testContext.verify(() -> { ... }))` to `testContext.succeeding(buffer -> testContext.verify(() -> { ... }))` with reduced nesting/braces.

graphql/src/test/java/com/example/demo/T.general_idea: Update the expected string prefix in the test assertion to match the new data content.
Add a debug log statement to trace the response buffer during the create post operation.
graphql/src/test/java/com/example/demo/T.human_impl: Added `log.debug("create post buf: {}", buf.toString());` before parsing the response.

mutiny-spring-hibernate/src/main/java/co.general_idea: Introduce a CountDownLatch to ensure the asynchronous database initialization completes before the application context finishes refreshing.
mutiny-spring-hibernate/src/main/java/co.human_impl: var latch = new CountDownLatch(1); ... latch.await(500, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS);

mutiny-spring-hibernate/src/main/java/co.general_idea: Add @SneakyThrows to suppress checked exceptions thrown by the synchronization logic.
